name: X-Golf Frederick
about: X-Golf Frederick is an indoor golf simulator facility that offers a comprehensive entertainment experience combining high-tech golf simulation with a full-service bar and grill. The venue features advanced golf simulators that provide players with access to world's top courses in a high-energy indoor setting. Additionally, it hosts private events, leagues, and offers lessons with PGA professionals. Birdies Bar & Grill serves as an in-house dining option, allowing guests to enjoy food and drinks while playing or watching sports on large screens. The facility is suitable for both casual players and serious golfers looking to practice or enjoy a social outing.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced golf simulator technology with 6,000 calculations per second for highly accurate tracking
All-in-one venue combining golf simulation with dining and sports viewing experiences
Flexible options including private event spaces, leagues, and PGA professional instruction

food_and_drink.notes: In-house Birdies Bar and Grill offers food and drinks
Full-service bar with beer and cocktails available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify if club rentals are available, but it's common at indoor facilities. It's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an in-house Birdies Bar and Grill, so bringing outside food or drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify exact timing, but with 3-hour reservations and special deals for extended play, it suggests 18 holes can be completed within 2-3 hours depending on simulator capacity and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Frederick appears to be kid-friendly with mentions of junior lessons and events like the Girls Golf Club.
